source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for the Virtual Management of Acne
source.population: Adolescents and adults with acne complaints, including post-adolescent acne.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth acne documentation; treatment selections remain clinician-entered and pending review.

exact_location.heading: 5.1 Virtual Clinical Assessment and Clinical History

source.evidence_paraphrase: Covers distribution, lesion types, scarring, hyperpigmentation, hormonal patterns, pain, prior treatment, and psychological impact.
